hero.title: Akoya Signature Fragrances
hero.subtitle: Premium scents crafted to elevate your laundry experience

maknoun.name: Maknoun
maknoun.description: A luxurious fragrance that embodies the charm of a confident man. A refined blend of fresh fruits, elegant florals, and a warm base of musk and amber, leaving an unforgettable signature.

mad.name: Mad
mad.description: A powerful masculine fragrance that radiates prestige and luxury. Its unique composition blends saffron, jasmine, and incense, with a leathery amber base for a timeless presence

lulwa.name: Lulwa
lulwa.description: The fragrance of radiant femininity, combining modern freshness with timeless elegance. A stunning blend of bergamot, ginger, and patchouli with a soft musky touch, leaving a memorable sparkle.

sadf.name: Sadf
sadf.description: A refreshing fragrance for both men and women, featuring bright citrus notes, warm ginger, and ambergris for an elegant and long-lasting touch.

plasticWrap.title: Plastic Wrap
plasticWrap.description: Crystal-clear protective wrapping with our embossed gold seal for discreet luxury

fabricWrap.title: Luxury Fabric Wrap
fabricWrap.description: Crystal-clear protective wrapping with our embossed gold seal for discreet luxury

giftBox.title: Premium Gift Box
giftBox.description: Handcrafted wooden presentation case with velvet interior and scent capsule.
